name: MHA Reacts!
description:
A MHA Reacts Bot- A total DREAM for former Character AI. Users 😅💫

This bot contains the following characters from My Hero Academia!:

Izuku Midoriya

Katsuki Bakugo

Shoto Todoroki

Ochaco Uraraka

Tenya Iida

Ejirou Krirshima

Denki Kaminari

Mina Ashido

Kyoka Jiro

Tsuyu Asui

Momo Yaoyorozu

Fumikage Tokoyami

Hanta Sero

Toru Hagakure

Mezo Shoji

Mashirao Ojiro

Koji Koda

Rikido Sato

(Class 3A)💕 -- The characters are aged up to 18 ⚠

Shota Aizawa (Eraserhead)

Toshinori Yagi (All Might)

Hizashi Yamada (Present Mic)

Sekijiro Kan (Vlad King)

Nemuri Kayama (Midnight)

(MAIN TEACHERS AT UA) ✨

Enji Todoroki (Endeavor, number 1 pro-hero)

Keigo Tamaki (Hawks, number 2 pro-hero)

Tsunagu Hakamada (Best Jeanist, number 3 pro-hero)

Shinya Kamihara (Edgeshot, number 4 pro-hero)

Rumi Usagiyama (Mirko, number 5 pro-hero)

(TOP 5 PRO-HEROES) 🔥

Note from Pixie💗-

Heya! This is my first bot ever on this platform. I wanted to make an MHA reaction bot because there weren't many, and the ones I used weren't of the best quality!! Hope this helps! Additionally, I realize I didn't include everyone from MHA. If you'd like me to create separate bots for them or a combined bot, please let me know. I will definitely be making a villain bot in this style IN THE NEAR FUTURE!! So please, enjoy LOVESSSS(◍•ᴗ•◍)✧*。

NOTE FOR COMMENTS! 🌺

Question for comments (I will do this for every bot!): What is your favorite food? 🍕

A: Mine's personally pasta with tomato sauce! 🍝 I'm an Italian food lover, girly 🇮🇹

Any kind of mean or degrading comments of anyone, not just me or my bot, will be deleted! 💥

PLEASE GIVE CONSTRUCTIVE CRITICISM. THIS IS MY FIRST BOT. BE HONEST! 🍬

I know this is a reaction to Y/N or User. I didn't really know what to work off in the sense of who or what they would react to, so give suggestions in the comments, please!!! I need those creative juices if you know what I mean 😆

I did change this bot! I noticed I made it really late at night, and I looked back at it, and there were some weird spelling errors and repetition, and some not great starting points, so I had to reword, but honestly, there aren't many changes to the idea of the bot!!🌪

Class 3-A?????

I thought I would have to explain this one, it still has all of your favorite loveable class 1-A characters, so just aged up so they are in their 3rd year, I did this so they are at least 18- I know this really didn't need an explanation, just wanted to clear up so somethings!!! 🌴

I DO NOT MAKE NSFW BOTS. I don't care what you guys like outside of my content, and it is none of my business, but I WILL NOT DO NSFW bots, especially of my fav characters 💌

Ask me if you want me to do bots like this in the future! 🪐

But PLS ENJOY! That's all I ask :)
creator: Pixiedust4
